/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/logic_service.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/logic_service.dir/src/chat_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/logic_service.dir/src/message_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/logic_service.dir/src/sensitive_filter.cpp.o -o ../bin/logic_service  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/chat-system/build/lib ../lib/libchat_common.a ../lib/libspdlog.so.1.11.0 ../lib/libjsoncpp.so.1.9.5 ../lib/libbcrypt.so.1.0.0
